title: Mage Smp Datapack
description: This Is A Datapack With 8 Different Wands That All Have Special Abilities.
body:
## This project is the datapack used in the mage smp that adds 8 wands with special abilitys.


<details>
<summary>Effect Wand</summary>

Effect Wand - Drop a potion on the ground and right click to upgrade that potion (only works with certain potions) with a 3 minute cooldown / Upgraded Ability: gives all players in a 15 block radius a random negative effect with a 4 minute cooldown

![The Effect Wand Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/22bf63ab328e1336282dfb08ab85cf2284b58ab6.jpeg)![Upgraded Effect Wand Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3dc3cd29f96c00f73879dbda0620b5142286f38e.jpeg)

</details>




<details>
<summary>Death Wand</summary>

Death Wand - Gives strength 3 for 30 seconds when right clicked with a 5 minute cooldown / Upgraded Ability: Deals 5 hearts of damage to all players in a 15 block radius no matter what armor they are wearing with a 5 minute cooldown

![The Death Wand Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b1d61732c8dfbe0f94dae3b09621e534c93aea53.jpeg)![Upgraded Death Wand Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b4554b14adce38b5001abcb6ec37333dc0fc0904.jpeg)

</details>




<details>
<summary>Sonic Wand</summary>

Sonic Wand - Gives speed 3 for 1 minute with a 2 minute coolown / Upgraded Ability: Uses the wardens sonic boom atack in front of you with a 6 minute cooldown

![The Sonic Wand Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/611b2c9dd37593ad7152ea855ee2fbb8bf352ded.jpeg)![Upgraded Sonic Wand Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/30505c2c694557d7cbd41b9eb02087911e118c99.jpeg)

</details>




<details>
<summary>Frozen Wand</summary>

Frozen Wand - Freezes all players in a 15 block radius for 5 seconds with a 1.5 minute cooldown / Upgraded Ability: Shoots ice splinters that do 2 hearts of damage no matter what armour they are wearing with a 20 second cooldown

![The Frozen Wand Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/38a2a369712551f3134603c0cf3e990363460125.jpeg)![Upgraded Frozen Wand Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8e140ff41c86cec5135bb050647e5f93fc743e50.jpeg)
</details>




<details>
<summary>Inferno Wand</summary>

Inferno Wand - Removes fire resistance effect from all players in a 15 block radius and sets the area arround them to fire with a 3 minute cooldown / Upgeraded Ability: Summons 8 blazes to help you fight other players with a 4 minute cooldown / When holding you get fire resistence

![The Inferno Wand Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/05799787730106ea4ff793bceabd0341fd30f6e3.jpeg)![Upgraded Inferno Wand Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6717792e414430c3011aaa615b22de4e7b4b2734.jpeg)
</details>




<details>
<summary>Lightning Wand</summary>

Lightning Wand - Teleports you 15 blocks in the direction you are looking with a 15 second cooldown / Upgraded Ability: Strikes every player in a 50 block radius with lightning with a 1 minute cooldown

![The Lightning Wand Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/72e2c90b9f31f6ab45d9cb929fcf193982390ac1.jpeg)![Upgraded Lightning Wand Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ca80b75debb5e1e2995048d1026d33f942593110.jpeg)
</details>




<details>
<summary>Grind Wand</summary>

Grind Wand - Makes all villager trades extremely cheap with a 2 minute cooldown / Upgraded Ability: Gives random loot to the player with a 1 minute cooldown / This wand acts like a netherite pickaxe with effency 5 and has fortune 10

![The Grind Wand Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/23c290e8e1ee9511fcb890834e6dce80fd891b7e.jpeg)![Upgraded Grind Wand Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e78982251b147bf0959a3b4d6888a712f0654df2.jpeg)
</details>




<details>
<summary>God Wand</summary>

God Wand - Has the abilitys of all the wands combind and adds banish ability which banishes the nearest player in a 20 block radius with a 1 hour cooldown

![The God Wand Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f2acda18518938d083576447583cd0494a6e5e46.jpeg)
</details>

If you are an admin there is a useful book with /function mage:admin. 
When you have the dragon egg in your inventory it halfs the cooldown of all the abilitys.
If you have the wand with the upgraded ability you can switch to it by pressing f (the key for switch to off-hand).

**All Of The Crafting Recipies Are In A Custom Crafting Table To Get That Crafting Table You Drop A Crafting Table And A Amethyst Shard On The Ground**

All Of The Upgraded Wands Use A Wand Upgrader You Can Get It From The Recipe Below Crafted In The Custom Crafting Table. The Lightning Wand And Grind Wand Use An Event Wand Upgrader You Can Only Get That From The Admin Book.

![The Wand Upgrader Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3c8a677902e6b5b145dad6e0395e0457fc33aae1.jpeg)
